events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the gauge shows 416 microns at isolation (t=0) and 5006 microns after 10 minutes — a rapid, large rise (~459 microns/min) that fails the standing decay test and points to a leak (most likely a defective braze joint) rather than normal moisture outgassing. Disposition: **fail**, high risk, `installed-defective`, with corrective actions to nitrogen/trace leak-check, re-braze, re-evacuate below 500 microns, and repeat the decay test before charging.
